In this state, Ixia's Basic Attacks and skills can hit enemies in the large fan-shaped area in front of her, but not outside it. Ixia's Basic Attacks can hit up to 6 enemy units (prioritizes heroes), and <font color="a6aafb">Siphon Starlium</font> will fire simultaneously with her normal Basic Attacks.

skills.name: Dimensional Rift
skills.description:
Nolan's skills will leave a <font color="a6aafb">Rift</font>. When a rift comes into contact with another rift, they will <font color="a6aafb">activate</font> and pull enemies to their center and deal 240<font color="fba51f"> (+140% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> after a short delay. Each time a rift activation hits an enemy, Nolan will gain 20 Energy. If an enemy is hit by multiple rift activations, the damage after the first hit will be reduced by 40%.
<font color="a6aafb">Cosmic Leap</font>: If Nolan does not deal or take damage for 5s, he enhances his next Basic Attack to dash to the target, dealing <font color="fba51f"> (+120% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and leaving a <font color="a6aafb">Rift</font>. (Damage to and from Minions or Creeps will not prevent Nolan from getting this effect.)

skills.name: Expansion
skills.description: Nolan cuts a rectangular area in front of him with his cosmic gauge, dealing 230<font color="fba51f"> (+40% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and leaving a <font color="a6aafb">Rift</font> at the first enemy hit.

skills.name: Gauge
skills.description: Nolan charges in the target direction and slashes with his cosmic gauge, dealing 70<font color="fba51f"> (+13% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in his path and leaving a <font color="a6aafb">Rift</font>.

skills.name: Fracture
skills.description: Nolan slashes at the target location 3 times, dealing 120<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> with each slash while leaving 3 rifts and slowing the target hit by 30% for 0.5s. The rifts will be activated automatically while Nolan dashes backward.

skills.name: Performer's Delight
skills.description: Cici generates a stack of Delight after dealing damage, increasing her Movement Speed by 0.75% and Spell Vamp by 0.75% per stack up to 10 times, doubling the effects at full stacks.

skills.name: Yo-Yo Blitz
skills.description:
Cici uses Yoyo to continuously attack the nearest enemy within range (prioritizing heroes) for 3.5s, hitting them up to 10 times, and dealing <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> equal to 65 plus 3<font color="fba51f"> (+1.2% Extra Physical Attack)</font>% of the target's Max HP per hit. Cici can move and use other skills during this attack.

If there is no enemy within range, Yoyo will attack Turrets or the Base instead.

This skill deals 20% extra damage to Minions.

skills.name: Buoyant Bounce
skills.description: Cici leaps to a target location. If she lands on any unit (not including Turrets and Base), she can leap again in the Joystick's direction. If she lands on an enemy with the first leap, she deals 200<font color="fba51f"> (+40% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to them.

skills.name: Curtain Call
skills.description:
Cici throws Yoyo at the target enemy hero and links them with another nearby enemy hero, dealing 100<font color="fba51f"> (+10% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, slowing them by 30%, and pulling them together for 4s. 

During this time, Cici can use <font color="a6aafb">Yo-Yo Blitz</font> to attack both linked targets at the same time. If only one target is within the range of <font color="a6aafb">Yo-Yo Blitz</font>, Cici will attack the target twice, but the damage of the second attack will be reduced to 25%.

skills.name: Snack Time!
skills.description: Chip starts eating potato chips once every 2s when out of combat, regenerating HP equal to 300 plus 45% of lost HP after finishing a whole bag (requires 4 bites). After eating a bag of chips, Chip will be full and cannot eat again for 5s. (The bite count will be saved if he enters combat before finishing a whole bag.)

skills.name: Crash Course
skills.description: Chip rams his hovercraft into the ground, dealing <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> equal to 100 plus 4% of the target's Max HP and applying <font color="a6aafb">Chip's Mark</font> on enemy units hit. Chip gains a 300<font color="62f8fe"> (+60% Total Magic Power)</font> Shield upon hitting an enemy hero, which increases by 40% for each additional enemy hero hit. Chip's next Basic Attack will become ranged and also hit all nearby enemies with <font color="a6aafb">Chip's Mark</font>, detonating the mark to deal 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and stun each target for 0.6s.

skills.name: Overtime
skills.description:
Chip rushes for 2s, gaining up to 65% extra Movement Speed, after which he maintains the max speed for 2s.

Chip's next Basic Attack will cause him to charge at the enemy, dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and knocking them back slightly.

skills.name: Shortcut
skills.description:
Chip drops the <font color="a6aafb">Main Portal</font> on an enemy hero, dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+60% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and briefly slowing them by 25%. The Main Portal deals 2 times the damage and immobilizes them for 1s after a delay. Meanwhile, he creates <font color="a6aafb">Connecting Portals</font> near allied heroes 10 units away and behind the allied Base. The <font color="a6aafb">Main Portal</font> and <font color="a6aafb">Connecting Portals</font> last up to 15s.
<font color="a6aafb">Connecting Portal</font>: Heroes (on both teams) can teleport from <font color="a6aafb">Connecting Portals</font> to the <font color="a6aafb">Main Portal</font>, and allied heroes gain Burst Movement Speed for 1.5s and a 500 shield.
<font color="a6aafb">Main Portal</font>: The Main Portal inherits 70% of Chip's attributes. Heroes can stand on the <font color="a6aafb">Main Portal</font> for 2s to return to the <font color="a6aafb">Connecting Portal</font> they came from. Casting skills or launching Basic Attacks will reset the stand time.

skills.name: Why Walk?
skills.description: Chip has 4 fixed <font color="a6aafb">Beacons</font> on the map when the battle starts. Use this skill to teleport to any other <font color="a6aafb">Beacon</font>. (This skill cannot be used in combat.)

skills.name: Crimson Butterflies
skills.description:
Every time Zhuxin channels <font color="a6aafb">Lantern Flare</font>, she converts the Mana spent into up to 15 <font color="a6aafb">Crimson Butterflies</font> to follow her <font color="a6aafb">Spirit Lantern</font>. After Zhuxin stops channeling <font color="a6aafb">Lantern Flare</font>, the <font color="a6aafb">Crimson Butterflies</font> will gradually disappear, each restoring 3% of her Max Mana.
Zhuxin has a naturally high base Max Mana, but it doesn't scale with her level.

skills.name: Fluttering Grace
skills.description: Zhuxin deals 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to all enemies in a fan-shaped area and applies 1 stack(s) of <font color="a6aafb">Soul Snare</font>. Zhuxin also slows all enemy heroes hit by 20% and gains 20% of extra Movement Speed herself for 1.5s.

skills.name: Lantern Flare
skills.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Hold</font>: Hold the skill button to move the <font color="a6aafb">Spirit Lantern</font>. It deals 35<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to all enemies in range every 0.33s (Magic Bonus increases to 60% against minions) and applies <font color="a6aafb">Soul Snare</font> to enemy heroes hit. When an enemy hero reaches 10 stacks of <font color="a6aafb">Soul Snare</font>, the <font color="a6aafb">Crimson Butterflies</font> capture them, pulling them airborne for 1s.

<font color="a6aafb">Release</font>: Throw all captured enemies to the target location, dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+150% Total Magic Power)</font> (+ 10% captured target's Max HP) <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to all enemies in the area. If an enemy is hit multiple times, subsequent damage decays by 80%.

After a target is captured, <font color="a6aafb">Soul Snare</font> cannot stack on them again for 4s. During this time, this skill deals 15% extra damage to that target.

skills.name: Crimson Beacon
skills.description: Zhuxin blinks to the target location, gaining a 400<font color="62f8fe"> (+100% Total Magic Power)</font> shield and creating a field for 6s. The field deals 30<font color="62f8fe"> (+10% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and applies 1 stack of <font color="a6aafb">Soul Snare</font> to nearby enemies every 0.5s.

skills.name: Transient Immortal
skills.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Tap-casting</font> any skill will put Suyou in his Mortal form, granting him 40 Movement Speed and decreasing the interval between Basic Attacks.
<font color="a6aafb">Hold-casting</font> any skill will put Suyou in his Immortal form, increasing the damage of Basic Attacks to 125% and granting him 20% Physical Damage Reduction. In this form, for every 20 extra Physical Attack Suyou has, he gains 1% Physical Damage Reduction (up to 40%).

skills.name: Blade Surge
skills.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Tap</font>: Suyou throws his weapon in the target direction, dealing 250<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in its path. Suyou then blinks to the weapon's location, catches it, and performs a slash in the opposite direction, dealing 375<font color="fba51f"> (+150% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.
<font color="a6aafb">Hold</font>: Suyou channels the Immortal's power and charges in the target direction, dealing 250<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies along the path. When hitting an enemy hero, he stops and stuns enemies in a rectangular area in front for 0.6s. The charge distance increases with the hold time.
<font color="A4AAC7">Suyou can be controlled while charging, but the skill cannot be interrupted</font>.

skills.name: Soul Sever
skills.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Tap</font>: Suyou performs a sweeping attack with his weapon, dealing <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> equal to 300<font color="fba51f"> (+200% Extra Physical Attack)</font> plus 15% of target's Lost HP to enemies in a fan-shaped area.
<font color="a6aafb">Hold</font>: Suyou channels the power of the Immortal to perform 3 cleaves in a fan-shaped area. The first two strikes deal 250<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> each, while the final strike deals 400<font color="fba51f"> (+128% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and recovers 150<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Extra Physical Attack)</font> HP for himself.

skills.name: Evil Queller
skills.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Tap</font>: Suyou glides backward and swings his weapon in the target direction, dealing 420<font color="fba51f"> (+120% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in a rectangular area and on his path backward, and reducing their Movement Speed by 30% for 1.5s.
<font color="a6aafb">Hold</font>: Suyou uses the Immortal's power to shoot a deadly arrow in the target direction, dealing 580<font color="fba51f"> (+165% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to the target hit. The range increases with the hold time. 
<font color="A4AAC7">Suyou can be controlled while charging, but the skill cannot be interrupted</font>.

skills.name: Hero's Resolve
skills.description:
Lukas gains 0.5 Resolve per second and an additional 2 Resolve when attacking heroes.

Lukas consumes 10 Resolve per second while in [Sacred Beast] form.

skills.name: Flash Combo
skills.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Passive</font>: Basic Attacks grant Vigor (up to 2 stacks), each stack lasting 4s. Vigor enhances <font color="a6aafb">Flash Combo</font>.
Lukas consumes all Vigor to unleash Pulverize, dealing 220<font color="fba51f"> (+120% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and recovering 5% of his Max HP when hitting a hero or minion.
<font color="a6aafb">1 Stack</font>: Lukas briefly stuns the target and spins his tonfa hammers to deal 100<font color="fba51f"> (+45% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> 3 times, pulling the enemy toward him.
<font color="a6aafb">2 Stacks</font>: Lukas briefly stuns the target, then delivers 2 attacks dealing 50<font color="fba51f"> (+20% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> each. Afterward, he spins his tonfa hammers, dealing 100<font color="fba51f"> (+45% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> 3 times while gaining Control Immunity for the duration.

skills.name: Flash Step
skills.description:
Lukas dashes in the target direction and turns his next Basic Attack within 4s into <font color="a6aafb">Flash Strike</font>.
<font color="a6aafb">Flash Strike</font>: Lukas blinks behind the enemy, dealing 60<font color="fba51f"> (+125% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. He then gains increased Attack Range, 20% Movement Speed and Attack Speed, and his Basic Attacks trigger lightning storms to deal 50<font color="fba51f"> (+25% Total Physical Attack)</font> extra <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, lasting for 4s.

skills.name: Unleash the Beast
skills.description:
Lukas transforms into his <font color="a6aafb">Sacred Beast</font> form (briefly gains Control Immunity). His base Movement Speed is increased by 30, all attributes are increased by 15%, and his skills gain new effects.
<font color="a6aafb">Use Again</font>: Fires a Shockwave Blast in the target direction that will explode upon hitting an enemy hero or reaching its maximum range, dealing 450<font color="fba51f"> (+155% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.
<font color="A4AAC7">All attributes: HP, Physical Attack, Attack Speed, Physical & Magic Defense, and Attack Range.</font>

skills.name: Surge of Life
skills.description:
After casting a skill, Kalea creates a <font color="a6aafb">Water Zone</font> on the ground. When Kalea casts a skill within this zone, she will absorb the Water Zone to enhance her next three Basic Attacks with different effects:
First Basic Attack: Kalea dashes to the target, dealing <font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.
Second Basic Attack: Kalea unleashes a flurry of attacks, dealing 200<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and recovering 40<font color="26e407"> (+10% Total HP)</font>  <font color="62f8fe">(+60% Total Magic Power)</font> HP for herself and the nearby ally with the lowest HP.
Third Basic Attack: Kalea uses her tail to strike the area around her target, dealing 100<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and creating a new <font color="a6aafb">Water Zone</font>. Enhanced Basic Attacks are not affected by Attack Speed.

skills.name: Wavebreaker
skills.description: Kalea slams her fist into the ground, creating a wave that deals 200<font color="26e407"> (+5% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to nearby enemies and slows them by 40% for 1.5s.

skills.name: Tidal Strike
skills.description:
Kalea charges forward and body slams the first enemy hero she encounters, knocking them airborne for 0.6s (unaffected by Resilience) while dealing 150<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.
If she collides with an obstacle or touches the edge of a <font color="a6aafb">Water Zone</font> during her charge, Kalea will leap into the air. Cast the skill again to slam down at a target location, dealing 150<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and knocking enemies airborne for 0.6s (unaffected by Resilience).

skills.name: Tsunami Slam
skills.description: Kalea grabs an enemy hero with her tail and slams them down in the Joystick's direction (drag the Joystick to change landing spot). She gains Control Immunity during this process. Upon landing, deals 300<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to the target and nearby enemies.

skills.name: Celestial Armament
skills.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Crown</font>: When Zetian hits enemy heroes with <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Strike</font> or <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Descent</font>, she gains 1% Spell Vamp for 5s (up to 10 stacks).

<font color="a6aafb">Celestial Robe</font>: The power of the Phoenix periodically protects Zetian, knocking back and stunning any enemy hero who approaches her, dealing 90(+10*Hero Level)<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font>. She also gains a 300(+20*Hero Level)<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font> shield for 3s. Cooldown: 120s.

skills.name: Phoenix Strike
skills.description:
Zetian unleashes a <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Wave</font> in the target direction. If it hits an enemy, she automatically casts another wave (up to 3 times). Zetian can cast other skills during this time.

The waves deal 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font>, 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font>, and 360<font color="62f8fe"> (+120% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font>, respectively. The 3rd wave has a larger area and pulls enemies toward the cast direction (not considered a control effect).

The Spell Vamp ratio against minions is only 65%.

skills.name: Phoenix Descent
skills.description:
Zetian summons a <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Spirit</font> at the target location, dealing 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+45% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and applying a brief 50% slow effect to enemies in the area. The <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Spirit</font> hovers at the location for 3s, dealing 20<font color="62f8fe"> (+10% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> every 0.5s and reducing enemies' Magic Defense by 10% while revealing their surrounding area.
While the <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Spirit</font> is active, Zetian can use this skill again to command it to charge toward a designated location, dealing 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+45% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and applying a brief 50% slow effect upon arrival.

skills.name: Fury of the Phoenix
skills.description:
Zetian calls upon her divine mandate and the hearts of her people, granting all allied heroes 40% Movement Speed that gradually decays over 3s, while bringing divine retribution upon all enemy heroes, dealing 400<font color="62f8fe"> (+100% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and stunning them for 0.8s. Zetian gains vision of all enemy heroes during this time.
Zetian can cast other skills while channeling this skill.

skills.name: Return to Bone
skills.description:
Obsidia gains <font color="a6aafb">Bone Energy</font> whenever she deals damage. Basic Attacks grant 1 Energy against non-hero units and 2 against hero units. Skills grant Energy equal to 3 times the amount granted by Basic Attacks against the same unit type. No Energy is gained from hitting creeps.

At 30 <font color="a6aafb">Bone Energy</font>, it forms a <font color="a6aafb">Bone Shard</font> (up to 25 shards). Killing an enemy hero instantly grants 1 <font color="a6aafb">Bone Shard(s)</font>. When Obsidia uses Basic Attacks, all <font color="a6aafb">Bone Shards</font> strike the target, each dealing <font color="fba51f"> (+6% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> (inherits 6% Attack Effects).

Obsidia's Basic Attacks deal 70<font color="fba51f"> (+70% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> (inherits 100% Attack Effects).

skills.name: Abyssal Bone Needle
skills.description: Obsidia launches an <font color="a6aafb">Abyssal Bone Needle</font>, dealing 325<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies hit and triggering <font color="a6aafb">Return to Bone</font> on the first enemy hero struck.

skills.name: Phantom Shadowmeld
skills.description: Obsidia descends into the Abyss and enters <font color="a6aafb">Shadowmeld Form</font>, gaining 500% Movement Speed for 0.3s.

skills.name: Hunt of Bone
skills.description:
Obsidia shoots <font color="a6aafb">Bones of Wrath</font> in the target direction, dealing 125<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and briefly stunning the first enemy hero hit, then pulls herself to the target. The <font color="a6aafb">Bones of Wrath</font> tether Obsidia to the enemy, preventing her from moving more than 4 units away. While tethered, the enemy cannot use displacement skills, and their movement will drag Obsidia along. During this time, Obsidia gains 5 temporary <font color="a6aafb">Bone Shards</font> and 30% Attack Speed. This effect lasts 3s.

While tethered, Obsidia can move through obstacles and use Basic Attacks while moving. <font color="a6aafb">Phantom Shadowmeld</font> is enhanced, with its duration increased to 1s and cooldown reduced to 33%.

skills.name: Mystic Surge
skills.description:
Sora can ascend to <font color="a6aafb">Thunder</font> or <font color="a6aafb">Torrent</font> by using his Ultimate. After ascending, dealing damage to heroes or summoned units grants 1 stack of <font color="a6aafb">Cloudstep</font>. Upon reaching 5 stacks, he unlocks his True Art.

<font color="a6aafb">Thunder</font>: Adopts an assassin style, converting 30% Max HP into Physical Attack (Equal to 10% of Max HP).
<font color="a6aafb">Torrent</font>: Adopts a tank style, converting 30% Physical Attack into Max HP (Gains 10 HP for every 1 Attack).

skills.name: Sundering Strike
skills.description: Sora strikes twice, dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, then lunges forward, dealing 240<font color="26e407"> (+5% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. He can dash after striking.

skills.name: Windstride
skills.description: Sora leaps forward, dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+55% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. If he hits an enemy hero or reaches max range, he slams the ground, dealing an additional 140<font color="26e407"> (+8% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and slowing them by 40% for 0.5s. Successful hits reduce the cooldown by 2s.

skills.name: Shifting Skies
skills.description:
Swipe left to ascend into <font color="a6aafb">Thunder</font> for 10s. Sora gains a brief bonus Movement Speed and becomes untargetable. He then summons lightning to strike nearby enemies 3 time(s), each dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.

Swipe right to ascend into <font color="a6aafb">Torrent</font> for 10s. Sora gains Control Immunity. After a short delay, he pulls nearby enemies in and deals 250<font color="26e407"> (+8% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.

skills.name: Platinum Snap
skills.description:
Marcel's split soul, <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font>, enters the camera to freeze the moment. Marcel's Basic Attacks deal 50<font color="fba51f"> (+40% Total Physical Attack)</font><font color="62f8fe">(+40% Total Magic Defense)</font><font color="fba51f"><1065 0.4></font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> (cannot Crit). He cannot benefit from extra Attack Speed. Extra HP is converted into 1.5% Hybrid Defense.

<font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> automatically snaps photos of enemy heroes near Marcel, causing a brief <font color="a6aafb">Frozen Moment</font> and dealing 20 (+ 5% their Max HP) <font color="ffe63c">True Damage</font> (triggers Attack Effects). It also grants a shield of the same value to Marcel and a nearby allied hero. Cooldown: 12s per target (each Basic Attack from Marcel reduces this cooldown by 1s).

skills.name: Framed Moment
skills.description: <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> focuses on an area around Marcel, slowing enemy heroes within by 20%. After 2.5s, he completes the shot, dealing 370<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Total Physical Attack)</font><font color="62f8fe">(+100% Total Magic Defense)</font><font color="fba51f"><1065 1></font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies within and immobilizing them for 1s.

skills.name: Tracking Shot
skills.description:
Artist inspiration time! Marcel enters the <font color="a6aafb">Tracking Haste</font> state for 3s, gaining 15% Movement Speed (increases to 75% when moving toward enemy heroes).

<font color="a6aafb">Use Again</font>: Marcel dashes in the target direction, leaving a framing phantom behind. If <font color="a6aafb">Framed Moment</font> is active, <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> remains at the original location to continue shooting.

skills.name: Golden Hour
skills.description:
Marcel and <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> perform a joint shoot. After a short delay, <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> takes a wide-angle shot of the target area for 3s. During this time, Marcel enters the <font color="a6aafb">Tracking Haste</font> state while inside the area. All other units in the area are put into a <font color="a6aafb">Frozen Moment</font> and are immune to all effects except from Marcel. All ranged Basic Attacks and projectiles are also frozen and will continue after a delay.

<font color="a6aafb">Golden Hour</font> resets the cooldown of <font color="a6aafb">Platinum Snap</font> for each enemy hero.
Allied heroes with the <font color="a6aafb">Platinum Snap</font> shield can move freely within the area.
